productName: Smokiez Midnight Prickly Pear Trifecta CBN:CBD:THC 1:1:1 Fruit Chews
description: A mouth-watering mixed-fruit chew inspired by handmade market candies — juicy, tangy, and soft enough to feel fresh from the candy kitchen. It blends CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 1:1:1 ratio. Perfect for winding down at the end of the day.
